variant: put CeraVe and La Roche-Posay moisturizers side by side in a table

request.message: put CeraVe and La Roche-Posay moisturizers side by side in a table

response_body.response: both lock in hydration and repair the barrier with ceramides and lipids. CeraVe tends to be more versatile across skin types; La Roche-Posay leans calming for reactive or rosacea-prone skin. pick based on whether you need heavy repair (CeraVe moisturizing cream) or lightweight daily use (either brand's lotion).

products.name: CeraVe Moisturizing Cream (Tub)
products.description: Heavy occlusive cream — good for very dry / eczema-prone skin.

products.name: The Ordinary Niacinamide 10% + Zinc 1%
products.description: 10% niacinamide for sebum control and pore appearance.

products.name: CeraVe PM Facial Moisturizing Lotion
products.description: Lightweight ceramide + niacinamide moisturizer for nightly use.

rows: works in step 6 (moisturizer) or as hydrating serum
